title: [ExportVerilog] Raise precedence of `>>>` aka signed shr

features.name: signed right shift with ternary argument
features.description: Code should include a signed right shift operator (>>>) where a ternary expression is used as the shift amount argument, requiring parentheses for correct precedence

features.name: signed wrapper around shift expression
features.description: Code should include $signed() applied to an expression containing a signed right shift (>>>) with a ternary as its argument
